documentation: --- substitutions: codecov: |- ```{image} https://codecov.io/gh/jazzband/sorl-thumbnail/branch/master/graph/badge.svg :alt: Coverage :target: https://codecov.io/gh/jazzband/sorl-thumbnail ``` django-badge: |- ```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/djversions/sorl-thumbnail.svg :alt: Supported Python versions :target: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/sorl-thumbnail ``` docs: |- ```{image} https://readthedocs.org/projects/pip/badge/?version=latest :alt: Documentation for latest version :target: https://sorl-thumbnail.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ ``` gh-actions: |- ```{image} https://github.com/jazzband/sorl-thumbnail/workflows/Test/badge.svg :target: https://github.com/jazzband/sorl-thumbnail/actions ``` jazzband: |- ```{image} https://jazzband.co/static/img/jazzband.svg :alt: Jazzband :target: https://jazzband.co/ ``` jazzband-badge: |- ```{image} https://jazzband.co/static/img/badge.svg :alt: Jazzband :target: https://jazzband.co/ ``` pypi: |- ```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/sorl-thumbnail.svg :alt: sorl-thumbnail on PyPI :target: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/sorl-thumbnail ``` python-badge: |- ```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/sorl-thumbnail.svg :alt: Supported Python versions :target: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/sorl-thumbnail ``` --- {{ jazzband-badge }} {{ pypi }} {{ python-badge }} {{ django-badge }} {{ docs }} {{ gh-actions }} {{ codecov }} Thumbnails for Django. # Features at a glance - Support for Django 4.2, 5.0 and 5.1 following the [Django supported versions policy] - Storage support - Pluggable Engine support for [Pillow], [ImageMagick], [PIL], [Wand], [pgmagick], and [vipsthumbnail] - Pluggable Key Value Store support (cached db, redis, and dynamodb by AWS) - Pluggable Backend support - Admin integration with possibility to delete - Dummy generation (placeholders) - Flexible, simple syntax, generates no html - ImageField for model that deletes thumbnails (only compatible with django 1.2.5 or less) - CSS style cropping options - Back smart cropping, and remove borders from the images when cropping - Margin calculation for vertical positioning - Alternative resolutions versions of a thumbnail Read more in [the documentation (latest version)](https://sorl-thumbnail.readthedocs.io/) # Developers {{ jazzband }} This is a [Jazzband](https://jazzband.co) project. By contributing you agree to abide by the [Contributor Code of Conduct](https://jazzband.co/about/conduct) and follow the [guidelines](https://jazzband.co/about/guidelines). Feel free to create a new Pull request if you want to propose a new feature. If you need development support or want to discuss with other developers join us in the channel #sorl-thumbnail at freenode.net or Gitter. For releases updates and more in deep development discussion use our mailing list in Google Groups. - IRC Channel: - Mailing List: ## Tests The tests should run with tox. Running `tox` will run all tests for all environments. However, it is possible to run a certain environment with `tox -e `, a list of all environments can be found with `tox -l`. These tests require the dependencies of the different engines defined in the documentation. It is possible to install these dependencies into a vagrant image with the Vagrantfile in the repo. # User Support If you need help using sorl-thumbnail browse and posts your questions with the `sorl-thumbnail` tag. # How to Use ## Get the code Getting the code for the latest stable release use 'pip'. ``` $ pip install sorl-thumbnail ``` ## Install in your project Then register 'sorl.thumbnail', in the 'INSTALLED_APPS' section of your project's settings. ``` INSTALLED_APPS = [ 'django.contrib.admin', 'django.contrib.auth', 'django.contrib.contenttypes', 'django.contrib.sessions', 'django.contrib.messages', 'django.contrib.staticfiles', 'sorl.thumbnail', ] ``` ## Templates Usage All of the examples assume that you first load the thumbnail template tag in your template.: ``` {% load thumbnail %} ``` A simple usage. ``` {% thumbnail item.image "100x100" crop="center" as im %} {% endthumbnail %} ``` See more examples in the section [Template examples] in the Documentation ## Model Usage Using the ImageField that automatically deletes references to itself in the key value store and its thumbnail references and the thumbnail files when deleted. Please note that this is only compatible with django 1.2.5 or less.: ``` from django.db import models from sorl.thumbnail import ImageField class Item(models.Model): image = ImageField(upload_to='whatever') ``` See more examples in the section [Model examples] in the Documentation ## Low level API You can use the 'get_thumbnail': ``` from sorl.thumbnail import get_thumbnail from sorl.thumbnail import delete im = get_thumbnail(my_file, '100x100', crop='center', quality=99) delete(my_file) ``` See more examples in the section [Low level API examples] in the Documentation ## Using in combination with other thumbnailers Alternatively, you load the templatetags by {% load sorl_thumbnail %} instead of traditional {% load thumbnail %}. It's especially useful in projects that do make use of multiple thumbnailer libraries that use the same name (`thumbnail`) for the templatetag module: ``` {% load sorl_thumbnail %} {% thumbnail item.image "100x100" crop="center" as im %} {% endthumbnail %} ``` # Frequently asked questions ## Is so slow in Amazon S3! Possible related to the implementation of your Amazon S3 Backend, see the [issue #351] due the storage backend reviews if there is an existing thumbnail when tries to generate the thumbnail that makes an extensive use of the S3 API A fast workaround if you are not willing to tweak your storage backend is to set: ``` THUMBNAIL_FORCE_OVERWRITE = True ``` So it will avoid to overly query the S3 API. [django supported versions policy]: https://www.djangoproject.com/download/#supported-versions [imagemagick]: https://imagemagick.org/ [issue #351]: https://github.com/jazzband/sorl-thumbnail/issues/351 [low level api examples]: https://sorl-thumbnail.readthedocs.io/en/latest/examples.html#low-level-api-examples [model examples]: https://sorl-thumbnail.readthedocs.io/en/latest/examples.html#model-examples [pgmagick]: https://pgmagick.readthedocs.io/ [pil]: https://python-pillow.org/ [pillow]: https://pillow.readthedocs.io/ [template examples]: https://sorl-thumbnail.readthedocs.io/en/latest/examples.html#template-examples [vipsthumbnail]: https://www.libvips.org/API/current/Using-vipsthumbnail.html [wand]: https://docs.wand-py.org/

this is the number of pixels times the band count

An ImageField Widget for django.contrib.admin that shows a thumbnailed
image as well as a link to the current one if it hase one.

Settings proxy that will lookup first in the django settings, and then in the conf

Adds deletion of thumbnails and key value store references to the

Checks that the file-upload field data contains a valid image (GIF,
JPG, PNG, possibly others -- whatever the engine supports).

modules.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.sorl_thumbnail
documentation:
This allows usage of sorl-thumbnail in templates
by {% load sorl_thumbnail %} instead of traditional
{% load thumbnail %}. It's specifically useful in projects
that do make use of multiple thumbnailer libraries (for
instance `easy-thumbnails` alongside `sorl-thumbnail`).

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.shortcuts.get_thumbnail
documentation: A shortcut for the Backend `get_thumbnail` method

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.shortcuts.delete
documentation: A shortcut for the Backend `delete` method

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.parsers.parse_geometry
documentation: Parses a geometry string syntax and returns a (width, height) tuple

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.parsers.parse_crop
documentation:
Returns x, y offsets for cropping. The window area should fit inside
image but it works out anyway

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.parsers.parse_cropbox
documentation: Returns x, y, x2, y2 tuple for cropping.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.cached_db_kvstore.KVStore.clear
documentation:
We can clear the database more efficiently using the prefix here rather
than calling {meth}`_delete_raw`.

classes.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.dbm_kvstore.DBMContext
documentation: A context manager to access the key-value store in a concurrent-safe manner.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.dbm_kvstore.KVStore.__init__
documentation: Please note that all the coding effort is devoted to provide correct
semantics, not performance.  Therefore, use this store only in development
environments.

classes.name: sorl.thumbnail.log.ThumbnailLogHandler
documentation: An exception log handler for thumbnail errors.

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.safe_filter
documentation:
A safe filter decorator only raising errors when `THUMBNAIL_DEBUG` is
`True` otherwise returning `error_output`.

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.resolution
documentation: A filter to return the URL for the provided resolution of the thumbnail.

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.is_portrait
documentation: A very handy filter to determine if an image is portrait or landscape.

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.margin
documentation: Returns the calculated margin for an image and geometry

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.background_margin
documentation: Returns the calculated margin for a background image and geometry

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.text_filter
documentation: Helper method to regex replace images with captions in different markups

classes.name: sorl.thumbnail.templatetags.thumbnail.ThumbnailNodeBase
documentation: A Node that renders safely

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.add_prefix
documentation: Adds prefixes to the key

functions.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.del_prefix
documentation: Removes prefixes from the key

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase.get
documentation: Gets the `image_file` from store. Returns `None` if not found.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase.set
documentation:
Updates store for the `image_file`. Makes sure the `image_file` has a
size set.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase.delete
documentation:
Deletes the reference to the `image_file` and deletes the references
to thumbnails as well as thumbnail files if `delete_thumbnails` is
`` True` ``. Does not delete the `image_file` is self.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase.delete_thumbnails
documentation: Deletes references to thumbnails as well as thumbnail `image_files`.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase.cleanup
documentation:
Cleans up the key value store. In detail:
1. Deletes all key store references for image_files that do not exist
   and all key references for its thumbnails *and* their image_files.
2. Deletes or updates all invalid thumbnail keys

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase.clear
documentation:
Brutely clears the key value store for keys with THUMBNAIL_KEY_PREFIX
prefix. Use this in emergency situations. Normally you would probably
want to use the `cleanup` method instead.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._get
documentation: Deserializing, prefix wrapper for _get_raw

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._set
documentation: Serializing, prefix wrapper for _set_raw

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._delete
documentation: Prefix wrapper for _delete_raw

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._find_keys
documentation: Finds and returns all keys for identity,

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._get_raw
documentation: Gets the value from keystore, returns `None` if not found.
Methods which key-value stores need to implement

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._set_raw
documentation:
Sets value associated to key. Key is expected to be shorter than 200
chars. Value is a `unicode` object with an unknown (reasonable)
length.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._delete_raw
documentation: Deletes the keys. Silent failure for missing keys.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.kvstores.base.KVStoreBase._find_keys_raw
documentation: Finds all keys with prefix

classes.name: sorl.thumbnail.base.ThumbnailBackend

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.base.ThumbnailBackend.get_thumbnail
documentation:
Returns thumbnail as an ImageFile instance for file with geometry and
options given. First it will try to get it from the key value store,
secondly it will create it.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.base.ThumbnailBackend.delete
documentation:
Deletes file_ references in Key Value store and optionally the file_
it self.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.base.ThumbnailBackend._create_thumbnail
documentation: Creates the thumbnail by using default.engine

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.base.ThumbnailBackend._create_alternative_resolutions
documentation:
Creates the thumbnail by using default.engine with multiple output
sizes.  Appends @<ratio>x to the file name.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.base.ThumbnailBackend._get_thumbnail_filename
documentation: Computes the destination filename.

The main class for sorl-thumbnail, you can subclass this if you for example
want to change the way destination filename is generated.

methods.name: sorl.thumbnail.images.ImageFile.flip_dimensions
documentation:
Do not manipulate image, but ask engine whether we'd be doing a 90deg
rotation at some point.
